prose:
Fukui reactivity descriptors for nitrobenzene computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, density-fit, PySCF) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The calculation determines electrophilic (f⁺), nucleophilic (f⁻), radical (f⁰), and dual descriptor indices by computing Mulliken charges on the neutral molecule, N+1 cation (charge +1, mult 2), and N−1 anion (charge −1, mult 2). SCF converged for all three states; charge conservation checks passed. Most electrophilic site: C atom 3 (ortho to NO₂), f⁺ = 0.4964. Most nucleophilic site: C atom 4 (meta to NO₂), f⁻ = 0.1073. Dual descriptor at ortho position = 0.5107, reflecting strong electrophilic activation by the electron-withdrawing nitro group. Full per-atom indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor) reported above in table. Visualization generated.</prose>
